sentences.target: Ich hole uns schnell eine Glace.

translations.de: Ich hole uns schnell eine Glace.
translations.en: I’ll quickly get us an ice cream.
translations.es: Voy a por un helado para nosotros ahora mismo.
translations.fr: Je vais nous chercher une glace vite fait.
translations.it: Vado a prenderci un gelato al volo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我这就去给咱们买个冰淇淋。
translations.yue: 我快啲去幫我哋買個雪糕。
translations.ru: Я сейчас быстренько схожу и возьму нам мороженое.
translations.pt: Vou ali buscar um sorvete para a gente rapidinho.
translations.he: אני אקפוץ להביא לנו גלידה מהר.
translations.tr: Hemen gidip bize bir dondurma alayım.
translations.vi: Tớ đi mua cho tụi mình một cây kem liền.
translations.ar: سأذهب بسرعة لأحضر لنا آيس كريم.
translations.nl: Ik haal snel een ijsje voor ons.
translations.hi: मैं जल्दी से हमारे लिए एक आइसक्रीम ले आता हूँ.
translations.pl: Szybko pójdę po loda dla nas.
translations.el: Πάω γρήγορα να μας πάρω ένα παγωτό.
translations.nb: Jeg stikker og henter en is til oss.
translations.id: Aku cepat-cepat beli es krim buat kita.
translations.sv: Jag går snabbt och hämtar en glass åt oss.
translations.ro: Mă duc repede să ne iau o înghețată.
translations.da: Jeg smutter lige hen og henter en is til os.
translations.ja: すぐアイス買ってくるね。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes a direct object and an indirect/benefactive.
1st person plural personal pronoun in dative; indirect/benefactive object with 'holen'.
Adverb of manner modifying the verb 'hole'.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Glace'.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'hole'.

translations.en: You can try my ice cream.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以尝尝我的冰淇淋。
translations.vi: Bạn có thể ăn thử kem của tôi.
translations.ar: يمكنك تذوق الآيس كريم الخاص بي.
translations.hi: तुम मेरी आइसक्रीम चख सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να δοκιμάσεις το παγωτό μου.
translations.nb: Du kan smake på isen min.
translations.sv: Du kan smaka på min glass.
translations.ro: Poți să guști din înghețata mea.
translations.ja: 私のアイス食べてみていいよ。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects infinitive 'probieren'.
Possessive determiner, feminine accusative singular; modifies 'Glace'.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'probieren'.
Lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal 'kannst'.

sentences.target: Die Glace schmilzt in der Sonne.

translations.de: Die Glace schmilzt in der Sonne.
translations.en: The ice cream is melting in the sun.
translations.es: El helado se está derritiendo al sol.
translations.it: Il gelato si sta sciogliendo al sole.
translations.pt: O sorvete está derretendo no sol.
translations.vi: Kem đang tan chảy dưới nắng.
translations.nl: Het ijsje smelt in de zon.
translations.hi: धूप में आइसक्रीम पिघल रही है.
translations.id: Es krimnya meleleh di bawah matahari.
translations.ja: アイスが日なたで溶けている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of 'Glace'.
Feminine noun, nominative singular; subject of 'schmilzt'.
Finite intransitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Preposition governing dative (locative meaning); introduces the PP 'in der Sonne'.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; determiner of 'Sonne'.
Feminine noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'in'.

sentences.target: Luca bezahlt die Glace an der Kasse.
sentences.reading: /ˈluːka bəˈt͡saːlt diː ˈɡlasə an deːɐ̯ ˈkasə/

translations.de: Luca bezahlt die Glace an der Kasse.
translations.ipa: /ˈluːka bəˈt͡saːlt diː ˈɡlasə an deːɐ̯ ˈkasə/
translations.en: Luca pays for the ice cream at the checkout.
translations.es: Luca paga el helado en la caja.
translations.fr: Luca paie la glace à la caisse.
translations.it: Luca paga il gelato alla cassa.
translations.zh-Hans: 卢卡在收银台为冰淇淋付款。
translations.yue: 盧卡喺收銀台畀雪糕錢。
translations.ru: Лука платит за мороженое на кассе.
translations.pt: Luca paga o sorvete no caixa.
translations.vi: Luca trả tiền kem ở quầy thu ngân.
translations.ar: لوكا يدفع ثمن الآيس كريم عند الصندوق.
translations.nl: Luca betaalt het ijsje bij de kassa.
translations.uk: Лука платить за морозиво на касі.
translations.hu: Luca a pénztárnál kifizeti a fagyit.
translations.hi: लूका काउंटर पर आइसक्रीम का भुगतान करता है.
translations.pl: Luca płaci za loda przy kasie.
translations.el: Ο Λούκα πληρώνει το παγωτό στο ταμείο.
translations.id: Luca membayar es krim di kasir.
translations.ja: ルカはレジでアイスの代金を払う。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; nominative subject of the clause.
Finite transitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Glace'.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'bezahlt'.
Preposition; here with dative indicating location ('an der Kasse').
Definite article, feminine dative singular; determiner of 'Kasse'.
Feminine noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'an'.
